action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Haywood, Bare, Prado, Sinicki, DeSmidt, Stubbs, Doyle, Neubauer, Goodwin, Joers, Taylor, Kirsch, Sheehan, Mayadev, Snodgrass, Subeck, Moore Omokunde, Arney, Emerson, Miresse, Palmeri, Madison, Fitzgerald, Roe, Hysell, Brown, Clancy, Udell, Tenorio, Andraca and Vining; 
cosponsored by Senators Drake, Spreitzer, Smith, Wirch, Roys, Hesselbein and Larson
